original_statement: what time did thierry boutsen finish at?
mutated_statement: what time did the participant finish at if they were required to finish before they started?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Semantic alteration (temporal contradiction) + Clause addition: "thierry boutsen" → "the participant" | simple factual past query → hypothetical/contradictory conditional requiring finishing before starting ("what time did thierry boutsen finish at?" → "what time did the participant finish at if they were required to finish before they started?")

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中明确表述“condition ‘finish before they started’ is impossible”和“Entrants who did not start (DNS) or did not qualify...have no finish time recorded. Therefore, the finish time would be not applicable (n/a).”识别出关键事实：代理识别到时间上的矛盾（要求在开始前完成）并未尝试去执行该不可能的操作。具体表现为：通过事实与逻辑推理（引用DNS/DNPQ和空白记录的含义）来解释为何无法产生一个合理的完成时间，并以“n/a/不适用”作为结论。归类理由：代理没有折中执行或忽视矛盾，而是用逻辑解释将矛盾情形在语义上合理化，符合“逻辑解释合理化”的定义。
